properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Be thou strong and very courageous Dispossess the inhabitants of your land I have given you this promise And it is time to take a stand You've got to drive out your enemies So your loved ones can go free And little by little You'll gain the victory

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Little by little You can win every battle Little by little You can conquer every foe God will set His boundaries all around you They will stretch from sea to sea And little by little You'll gain the victory

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You've got rights in the Holy Spirit And you've been given full authority in His Name There is no time now left for crying It's a shame to complain You've got to kick the devil off of your mountain You're predestined and ordained Don’t you know you are a soldier In the army of the King

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You have truly, truly been commissioned By Jesus, He's the Captain of the host You are equipped to fight this battle Even though it is the Lord's Prayer is a mighty weapon The weakest Christian can take hold Praying makes the demons tremble But it puts God in control

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: My God will send His boundaries all around you They will stretch from sea to sea Little by little You'll gain… the victory.
